'''Patricia Katarn''' was the wife of [[Morgan Katarn]] and the mother of [[Kyle Katarn]].

==Biography==
Morgan fell in love with her, and they were married towards the end of the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

The only memory Kyle had from her was from the time he was crying about something and his mother held him in her arms, making him feel safe and comfortable.<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>

She was killed one night she was working late around the [[Katarn estate]], when the family's [[BT-16 perimeter droid|BT-16]] perimeter security droid's sensors malfunctioned. Mistaking Patricia for a hostile target, it opened fire, killing her instantly.<ref name="DFS">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}}</ref> By that time Kyle was too young and hardly had any memories of her.

==Legacy==
The [[Katarn family]] was devastated by her death, not only emotionally; her work in the farm was essential and a widower father with his underage son struggled to maintain it. One reason Kyle chose to leave his home in his early age, was to alleviate some financial burden from his father.<ref name="DFS" />

[[Candice Ondi]] reminded Morgan of Patricia.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>

The family kept a 3-D print picture hanging in the [[Katarn family compound|Katarn homestead]], between the living room and the workshop. During the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] the home had been ransacked, Kyle found it askew when he [[Mission to Sulon|returned]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. Tenderly, he rolled it into a cylinder, secured it with a wire and took it with him, until [[Jan Ors]] picked him up with the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''.<ref name="RA" />

Later, Ors found the cylinder and the print in the ship; after an initial bout of jealousy, she recognised her from her [[eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="RA" />

==Personality and traits==
Patricia was a woman of beautiful human traits, with eyes that were inherited by her son.<ref name="RA" />
